title: Health practitioner ratings site ceases charging for rating takedowns, a PIPEDA “no-go-zone”
summary: The operator of RateMDs.com (“RateMDs”), a website which allows users to rate and review health professionals, was alleged by a complainant to have placed personal information on its site for lucrative purposes without her consent, contravening Principle 4.3 of Schedule 1 of PIPEDA . This Report of Findings concerns a complaint made by a...
dedupKey: health practitioner ratings site ceases charging for rating takedowns a pipeda no go zone|2020-06-30
